videos.hook_text: Flip a coin 10 times in a row -- what are the odds you get ALL heads?
videos.notes: First ledger entry for this slug -- no prior analytics to retrieve, so bet is pure variety: every segment gets its own new mechanic (narrowing gates, dice tower, shrinking card fan, growth line) instead of repeating the bar/bubble kit defaults that were previously on 2 of 4 segments.

timeline.detail: coin flip curiosity question over narrowing-odds-gates build-in
dice-probability-tower: sum-7 tower rises tall vs matching short 2/12 towers
shrinking-deck-fan: card fan loses a card, target card glows, odds tick up
growth-line-photo: seedling rides the rising application-index line
closing line: luck was math nobody calculated

videos.hook_text: Somewhere right now, a language is taking its last breath -- and it happens every 14 days.
videos.notes: Fixed a real data bug while authoring: language_distribution's Mandarin point was 1.3 (should be 1300, i.e. 1.3 billion) which made the top language render as the smallest bar -- corrected the unit and added the missing Hindi/Arabic points so the say line's 5-language claim actually matches the data. Kept exactly one photo+number layout (the flag ground-row) per house variety rule; the other 3 segments are fresh procedural mechanics.

timeline.detail: a language dies every 14 days, over urgency-dials build-in
flag ground-row: Mandarin/Spanish/English/Hindi/Arabic sized by native speakers
digital-silence-globe: globe lit only 10% up, dark zone dotted with fading languages
seedling-revival-meter: revival dial + sprouting leaves for the 15%/yr learner growth
closing line: half of today's 7,000 languages could go silent
